scenes.description: 黄色小熊站在木门前,表情从疑惑转为惊恐；镜头切换至巨大的豌豆藤蔓,兔子和小猫在上面显得害怕。
scenes.video_prompt: A cute yellow bear stands in front of an orange wooden door, its expression shifting from confusion to fear. The camera quickly cuts to a towering pea vine stretching into the sky, with a rabbit and kitten clinging to it, visibly frightened. Bright, vivid colors and natural sunlight create a lively yet tense atmosphere. The scene uses dynamic close-ups and wide-angle shots to emphasize scale and emotion. Rendered in soft animated style with expressive character animation.

style_elements.characters: Expressive cartoon animals: yellow bear, rabbit, kitten with exaggerated facial expressions
style_elements.environment: Orange wooden house, blue sky, green bushes, giant magical pea vine
style_elements.visual_style: Bright, colorful animation with soft lighting and high detail
style_elements.camera_movement: Close-up on bear, quick cut to wide shot of vine, upward tilt

scenes.description: 小兔子闭眼微笑,老鼠紧张担忧,小熊惊讶；老鼠拿起棍子,决心扳倒豌豆藤。
scenes.video_prompt: A gentle rabbit smiles peacefully with closed eyes, while a small mouse looks anxious, clutching a stick with determination. Beside them, the yellow bear watches in surprise. The garden setting features blooming flowers and lush greenery under warm daylight. The camera slowly pans across their faces to highlight emotional contrast. A sense of urgency builds as the mouse declares action. Animated in cheerful but detailed style, with soft textures and vibrant hues to maintain child-friendly tone.

style_elements.characters: Rabbit, mouse, and bear showing distinct emotions through facial expressions
style_elements.environment: Garden near orange house, filled with plants and flowers
style_elements.visual_style: Colorful 2D animation with natural lighting and soft shadows
style_elements.camera_movement: Slow pan across characters, medium close-ups

scenes.description: 老鼠号召合作,三人决定联手拯救被困在藤蔓上的小动物。
scenes.video_prompt: The mouse raises its stick with courage, gesturing toward the giant vine. The bear nods firmly, and the rabbit opens its eyes with resolve. They exchange determined glances, forming a plan. Warm sunlight bathes the scene, enhancing unity and hope. The camera circles the trio slightly to emphasize teamwork. Character movements are fluid and expressive, reinforcing emotional connection. Style remains consistent with earlier scenes—bright, cartoonish, and emotionally engaging.

style_elements.characters: Mouse leading, bear supporting, rabbit joining with renewed focus
style_elements.environment: Front yard of orange house, green garden, distant view of pea vine
style_elements.visual_style: Lively 2D animation with emotional depth and soft outlines
style_elements.camera_movement: Slight circular motion around the group, medium shot

scenes.description: 小女孩在果园玩耍,小熊拿着绳子微笑,展现田园生活的温馨场景。
scenes.video_prompt: A little girl plays with a skipping rope in a sunlit orchard surrounded by fruit trees and wildflowers. Nearby, the yellow bear holds a rope with a kind smile, watching her joyfully. The orange house sits peacefully in the background under a clear blue sky. Soft breeze sways the leaves. The camera gently tracks the girl’s movement, then cuts to a static medium shot of the bear. Warm tones dominate, evoking nostalgia and innocence. Animation is smooth, with delicate light effects and pastoral charm.

style_elements.characters: Young girl playing, yellow bear observing warmly
style_elements.environment: Orchard with fruit trees, flowers, rural landscape
style_elements.visual_style: Pastel-toned, gentle animation with natural lighting
style_elements.camera_movement: Tracking shot following girl, then static medium shot

scenes.description: 豌豆藤蔓继续生长,缠绕房顶,小动物们处于危险中,大家商议救援方案。
scenes.video_prompt: The colossal pea vine spirals around the rooftop, threatening to collapse. The rabbit trembles, the kitten clings desperately, and the bear shouts encouragement from below. The mouse points urgently at weak points in the vine structure. Dialogue conveys rising tension and urgency. Wide establishing shots show the full scale, alternating with tight close-ups on fearful faces. Lighting remains bright but dramatic shadows add suspense. Consistent animation style with enhanced motion blur during intense moments.

style_elements.characters: Kitten and rabbit in distress, bear and mouse coordinating rescue
style_elements.environment: Roof of orange house entangled in massive pea vines
style_elements.visual_style: High-contrast animated scene with dynamic lighting
style_elements.camera_movement: Wide shots, quick cuts, upward tilts to show height

scenes.description: 小熊勇敢爬上屋顶救人,成功救下小猫,但小猫还想继续玩。
scenes.video_prompt: The brave yellow bear climbs the swaying vine toward the roof, determined. Reaching the top, it gently rescues the kitten, who giggles and resists being taken down. 'We want to play more!' they say. Below, the rabbit cheers. Camera follows the ascent with a rising crane shot, then shifts to playful close-ups. The mood lightens despite danger. Animation emphasizes bouncy motion and comedic timing. Sunlight highlights the joyful resolution.

style_elements.characters: Bear as hero, kitten mischievously reluctant to leave
style_elements.environment: Top of house, tangled in flexible pea vines
style_elements.visual_style: Playful animation with exaggerated physics and bright colors
style_elements.camera_movement: Crane-up shot during climb, handheld-style close-ups

scenes.description: 小胡从仓库拿出工具,制作解决方案,帮助稳定局势。
scenes.video_prompt: Little Hu returns from a shed carrying ropes, pulleys, and tools. He begins constructing a support system for the weakened vine. Others assist eagerly. Close-ups show hands working, gears turning, knots tightening. The camera moves steadily along the process, highlighting ingenuity. Background music turns hopeful. Visuals remain clean and colorful, with practical details adding realism. Lighting is even and functional, focusing attention on teamwork and problem-solving.

style_elements.characters: Hu as inventor, supported by bear, mouse, rabbit
style_elements.environment: Backyard workshop area near house and vine base
style_elements.visual_style: Detailed hand-drawn animation with mechanical elements

scenes.description: 众人合力将豌豆藤移到垃圾池,准备为其寻找新家。
scenes.video_prompt: The team carefully guides the giant pea vine onto a cart, pulling it toward a disposal site. They discuss giving it a new home. Emotional tone is caring, not destructive. Wide group shot shows unity. The camera pulls back slowly as they walk together, symbolizing closure. Colors soften slightly, suggesting transition. Animation blends humor and heart—vine wiggles like it's alive. Voiceover expresses compassion for nature.

style_elements.characters: All animals working together, treating vine with respect
style_elements.environment: Pathway from house to edge of town, cart in use
style_elements.camera_movement: Wide dolly-out shot, slow follow behind

scenes.description: 决定将豌豆藤作为盆景送往公园,赋予其新的意义。
scenes.video_prompt: The group decides to transplant the pea vine into a park as an ornamental bonsai. Excited chatter fills the air. They wrap the roots gently, place it in a decorative pot. Camera focuses on tender actions—watering, labeling, smiling faces. Transition from chaos to harmony. Lighting becomes golden-hour soft, enhancing serenity. This scene celebrates renewal and environmental care. Animation style matures slightly, emphasizing beauty and purpose.

style_elements.characters: Team acting as gardeners, nurturing the plant
style_elements.environment: Preparation zone near house, potted plant setup
style_elements.visual_style: Soft-focus animation with golden hour lighting
style_elements.camera_movement: Close-ups on hands, slow zoom out to group

scenes.description: 购物归来发现小猫在怀里睡觉,妈妈来接,温馨互动。
scenes.video_prompt: A shopper returns with bags, surprised to find the kitten asleep in the bear’s arms. A mother cat arrives, relieved and grateful. Gentle reunion unfolds—soft nuzzles, quiet laughter. The bear hands over the kitten with care. Background orchard glows in afternoon light. Camera uses shallow depth of field to isolate the emotional moment. Music turns tender. Animation shines with subtle fur textures and realistic eye blinks, heightening warmth.

style_elements.characters: Sleeping kitten, caring bear, relieved mother cat
style_elements.environment: Front porch of orange house, late afternoon light
style_elements.visual_style: Emotionally rich animation with soft textures
style_elements.camera_movement: Shallow focus, slow push-in on interaction

scenes.description: 为庆祝举办豌豆饭,但因回忆巨大豌豆而不敢吃,引发笑声。
scenes.video_prompt: A large bowl of steamed peas is presented proudly. The bear smiles expectantly—but the rabbit recoils comically, remembering the giant vine. Laughter erupts. Everyone shares a humorous moment, poking fun at past fears. Close-ups capture exaggerated reactions. The food glistens under kitchen lights. Tone is lighthearted and familial. Animation uses squash-and-stretch for comedy. Background decor includes pea-themed art, adding whimsy.

style_elements.characters: Bear serving, rabbit reacting dramatically, others laughing
style_elements.environment: Cozy kitchen inside orange house, festive table setting
style_elements.visual_style: Whimsical cartoon style with comedic exaggeration
style_elements.camera_movement: Close-ups on faces and dish, slight zoom-in on reaction

scenes.description: 举行盛大的豌豆舞会,大家一起跳舞庆祝,欢乐结尾。
scenes.video_prompt: A festive dance party begins in the orchard—'Pea Dance Festival' banners wave. Characters twirl, hop, and spin to upbeat music. Colorful lights blink as stars appear. The camera sweeps in a continuous circular motion around the dancers, capturing joy. Costumes feature pea motifs. Final shot rises into the sky, revealing the peaceful village below. Animation peaks in energy and color, closing with a heartwarming smile from the bear. A perfect end to a heroic day.

style_elements.characters: All characters dancing joyfully, wearing festive accessories
style_elements.environment: Nighttime orchard transformed into festival ground
style_elements.visual_style: Vibrant, energetic animation with glowing effects
style_elements.camera_movement: Circular drone-like sweep, rising final shot
